name: Turkey Cutlet Saute with Quick Red Pepper Sau
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Frozen peas, cauliflower, & baby carrots
1 lb Turkey breast slices, cut to 1/4" thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare frozen vegetables according to package directions.
2. Sprinkle turkey cutlets with salt and pepper.
3. In a 12-inch skillet over medium-high heat, heat olive oil.
4. Add cutlets; cook 4 to 6 minutes until cooked through, turning once.
5. Using tongs, remove to serving platter; keep warm.
6. In blender process roasted red peppers with their liquid until smooth; add to drippings in skillet along with water.
7. Cook 3 to 4 minutes, stirring frequently until hot.
8. Toss vegetables with chopped parsley; spoon onto platter with turkey.
9. Serve garnished, if desired, with parsley sprigs and accompanied by red pepper sauce.
